creator: tomek.cedro@gmail.com
text:
On Sat, Mar 13, 2010 at 10:15 AM, Martin Wilke <miwi@freebsd.org> wrote:
>> >> =C2=A0> This patch reject, could you please resync with the portstree=
, and
>> >> =C2=A0> resend a patch as attachment to me? Thanks.
>> >> =C2=A0>
>> >> =C2=A0>
>> >> =C2=A0> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D144241
>> >>
>> >> =C2=A0Here it goes :-)
>> >>
>> >> =C2=A0Best regads,
>> >> =C2=A0Tomek Cedro
>> >
>> > both mails not send a attachment :(
>>
>> Uhm, the gmail encrypts the attachments with base64. Please take a
>> look a the query page - the attachment is displayed correctly and can
>> be also downloaded from there. I also attach packed file, maybe it
>> will work for you (but it will be based64 also I suppose).
>>
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D144241
>
> got it thx, but seems the patch reject we need to be remove this one?

I dont quite understand :-)
The first patch had "work" directory included, my mistake - do you
mean that patch?
Is new patch allraight? Its made with fresh port tree, as you requested.

Best regads,
Tomek
